mapper.insert: INSERT INTO chef_profile_change ( user_id, avatar, display_name, real_name, id_card_imgs, health_cert_imgs, chef_cert_imgs, cuisine_type, service_area, service_desc, price, min_people, max_people, age, gender, work_years, phone, audit_status, reject_reason, create_time, update_time, audit_time ) VALUES ( #{change.userId}, #{change.avatar}, #{change.displayName}, #{change.realName}, #{change.idCardImgs}, #{change.healthCertImgs}, #{change.chefCertImgs}, #{change.cuisineType}, #{change.serviceArea}, #{change.serviceDesc}, #{change.price}, #{change.minPeople}, #{change.maxPeople}, #{change.age}, #{change.gender}, #{change.workYears}, #{change.phone}, #{change.auditStatus}, #{change.rejectReason}, #{change.createTime}, #{change.updateTime}, #{change.auditTime} )
mapper.update: UPDATE chef_profile_change SET user_id = #{change.userId}, avatar = #{change.avatar}, display_name = #{change.displayName}, real_name = #{change.realName}, id_card_imgs = #{change.idCardImgs}, health_cert_imgs = #{change.healthCertImgs}, chef_cert_imgs = #{change.chefCertImgs}, cuisine_type = #{change.cuisineType}, service_area = #{change.serviceArea}, service_desc = #{change.serviceDesc}, price = #{change.price}, min_people = #{change.minPeople}, max_people = #{change.maxPeople}, age = #{change.age}, gender = #{change.gender}, work_years = #{change.workYears}, phone = #{change.phone}, audit_status = #{change.auditStatus}, reject_reason = #{change.rejectReason}, update_time = #{change.updateTime}, audit_time = #{change.auditTime} WHERE id = #{change.id}
